Variables.Name: LengthMode
Variables.Description: Specified how the timeline determines its own length (e.g. specified length, last keyframe)

Variables.Name: Length
Variables.Description: How long the timeline is, will stop or loop at the end

Variables.Name: bLooping
Variables.Description: Whether timeline should loop when it reaches the end, or stop

Variables.Name: bReversePlayback
Variables.Description: If playback should move the current position backwards instead of forwards

Variables.Name: PlayRate
Variables.Description: How fast we should play through the timeline

Variables.Name: Events
Variables.Description: Array of events that are fired at various times during the timeline

Variables.Name: InterpVectors
Variables.Description: Array of vector interpolations performed during the timeline

Variables.Name: InterpFloats
Variables.Description: Array of float interpolations performed during the timeline

Variables.Name: InterpLinearColors
Variables.Description: Array of linear color interpolations performed during the timeline

Variables.Name: PropertySetObject
Variables.Description: Optional. If set, Timeline will also set floatvector properties on this object using the PropertyName set in the tracks.

Variables.Name: DirectionPropertyName
Variables.Description: Optional. If set, Timeline will also set ETimelineDirection property on PropertySetObject using the name.

Variables.Name: DirectionProperty
Variables.Description: Cached property pointer for setting timeline direction
